description_long: This dirt bike features a dynamic and aggressive design with a combination of matte black and vibrant yellow accents across its body panels, seat, and fenders. The frame is robust, supporting a high-mounted, angular seat and a compact, streamlined fuel tank. The front and rear wheels are fitted with thick, knobby tires suitable for off-road and urban terrain, and the wheels have a solid, modern spoke pattern. The handlebars are wide and slightly raised, equipped with angular mirrors and handguards for protection. The exhaust system is positioned on the right side, running low and parallel to the swingarm, with a metallic finish. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet sturdy construction, ideal for maneuverability and performance in urban environments.
description: A sporty dirt bike with black and yellow bodywork, thick knobby tires, and a low-mounted exhaust, designed for agility and urban performance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide handlebars with angular mirrors, dual headlights, and the aggressive front fender.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the yellow and black body panels, the raised seat, and the thick front and rear tires.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the narrow tail section, rear fender, and the taillight assembly, emphasizing the bike's streamlined profile.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the low-slung exhaust system, detailed engine area, and the full length of the seat and body graphics.
